description: Style NoteMulti purpose bags with oodles of style and tons of detailing mark baggit out - and they also succeed in keeping the designs understated and charming. Easily to pair up with whatever you're wearing to complement any outfit. Go ahead and grab your favourite from Baggit's classy range of bags. Product DetailsWhite patterned bag with branding at the backTwo short handlesOne main compartment with a zippered compartment dividerOne zippered compartment at the backMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean damp cloth when neededSizeHeight: 25 cmWidth: 33 cm
